nodes.context: Drug smuggling groups in the Spanish region of Galicia, main European entry point for Colombian cocaine.
Colombian drug trafficking organizations that supply cocaine to Galician clans.
British organized crime groups that work with Galician clans to smuggle drugs into the UK.
Albanian organized crime groups that have done business with Galician clans for heroin.
Turkish organized crime groups that have done business with Galician clans for heroin.
Notable Galician crime clan led by Manuel Charlín Gama, involved in drug trafficking and cigarette smuggling.
Galician crime clan founded by Manuel Baulo, said to have best contacts with British crime groups.
Mexican drug trafficking organizations allied with Galician Mafia.
French organized crime groups allied with Galician Mafia.
